construct_verdict_reason: All items consistently measure preference for national versus state-level legal uniformity across the specified policy domains, directly operationalizing the normative dimension of legal centralization.

items.reason: Directly measures preference for single national law versus state-specific laws in crime policy domain.
Directly measures preference for single national law versus state-specific laws in corruption policy domain.
Directly measures preference for single national law versus state-specific laws in information access policy domain.
Directly measures preference for single national law versus state-specific laws in public security policy domain.
Directly measures preference for single national law versus state-specific laws in environmental policy domain.
